a4_microSySTEM_Barrier.presenceSensor: Returns true if an obstacle is detected in front of the sensor and false otherwise
a4_microSySTEM_Barrier.rgb: Converts red, green, blue channels into a RGB color
a4_microSySTEM_Barrier.rgb|param|blue: value of the blue channel between 0 and 255. eg: 255
a4_microSySTEM_Barrier.rgb|param|green: value of the green channel between 0 and 255. eg: 255
a4_microSySTEM_Barrier.rgb|param|red: value of the red channel between 0 and 255. eg: 255
a4_microSySTEM_Barrier.setRingColor: Turns on the led in chosen color
a4_microSySTEM_Barrier.barrier: Opens or closes the barrier setting servo angle at 5° or 95°
a4_microSySTEM_Barrier.barrier|param|act: open=servo angle at 95° and close=servo angle at 5°
